action.reasoning: Observation: Code files exist but train.py is truncated. First iteration only verified data format. Need to write complete train.py and run training. Analysis: CLIP ViT-L/14 backbone with fine-tuning should give strong baseline. Need region-aware training to optimize worst-region accuracy. Decision: Complete train.py with region-weighted loss, run 5 epochs on 4 GPUs, then submit eval.
